title: Movie Screening - Dug Dug
caption_full:
The AIFF Show is back this Friday, 3rd July, 5 PM, at Science Park Auditorium, and this oneâ€™s big.
Weâ€™re hosting Ritwik Pareek, director, Prerna Pareek, producer and the entire team of Dug Dug . A film about a motorcycle shrine and a Rajasthani roadside legend that went all the way to the Toronto International Film Festival, and now itâ€™s coming back home to Jaipur where the story actually began.
Catch the screening, hear the team talk about how a local legend turned into a film that travelled the world.
3rd July | 5 PM | Science Park Auditorium

title: Heritage Photo Walk and Photography Workshop at City Palace
caption_full:
"Led by The Ethereal Circuit, in collaboration with Canon, we are delighted to invite you to a Heritage Photo Walk and Photography Workshop at the City Palace Museum, Jaipur.

This session offers a chance to wander through the Palaceâ€™s magnificent spaces, observing its architectural and cultural details while learning to capture them through the lens. Participants will explore composition, framing, and storytelling in an atmosphere that celebrates heritage and creativity.

We look forward to welcoming you. Please register via the link in bio.

title: Dabu Workshop at Nila Jaipur
caption_full:
268 likes, 3 comments - nilajaipur on June 26, 2026: "Join us for a two-day #nilaworkshop exploring Dabu in a unique way. Moving away from the traditional technique of Dabu printing, participants will work directly with daab (mud paste), using it as a medium to paint and make their own patterns. 

The session will also introduce the technique of creating daab (the mud paste) and its composition. As the process unfolds, youâ€™ll see your painted forms slowly come to life in Nilaâ€™s natural indigo vat. 

The workshop is open to all age groups. Lunch will be provided on both days. To register, please email info@nilajaipur.com.

3rd and 4th July | Friday and SaturdayÂ 
11am - 5pm | Nila House, Jaipur 

#mudresist #naturalindigo #dabu #painting".
